sglang.title: [PD] Handle P/D failure and reconnect without affecting other instances
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR enables Mooncake to handle both prefill and decode failures and reconnect without affecting other healthy instances. You can restart the dead/killed prefill instance or decode instance when it fails, and continue to pair it with on-the-fly instances.
This PR requires mooncake-tran

sglang.title: follow-up: move Idefics2 to a shared location to eliminate unexpected dependency.
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Quick follow up from #6494
Idefics2 is a vision model produced by HuggingFace, which is shared by both MiniCPMV, Phi4MM, and many other VLMs.
Currently Phi4MM is taking an incorrect dependency on MiniCPMV module, only because Idefics2 was placed there.
Modifications

Extract Idefics from

sglang.title: Refactor LoRA handling to support adapter tensors in fused format
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently SGL expects LoRA weights to come in certain formats (e.g., q_proj, k_proj, v_proj) and conducts some stacking during loading time to meet expectation of the lora backends.

However, there are some models (e.g., Phi4MM whose weight tensors come in pre-fused format, which is not

Qwen3 models on HuggingFace Hub use the Xet-backed storage system. In certain environments, the hf-xet downloader may fail with the following error during model weight loading:
RuntimeError: Data processing error: CAS service error: Error: single flight error:
Real call failed: CasObjectError(Intern

vllm.title: [V1][Sampler] Improve performance of FlashInfer sampling by sampling logits instead of probs
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR replaces flashinfer.sampling.top_k_top_p_sampling_from_probs with flashinfer.sampling.top_k_top_p_sampling_from_logits.
The top_k_top_p_sampling_from_props path calls (softmax) -> top_k_renorm_probs -> top_p_sampling_from_probs , top_k_top_p_sampling_from_logits calls top_k_mask_logits -> so

vllm.title: Convert `examples` to `ruff-format`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
RFC: #17657
If we are converting directory x:

In x, we add a local pyproject.toml which:

overrides ruff's line length to 88 (it's own default)
removes the deprecated type ignores
enables isort in ruff
enables formatting of code in docstrings (good for the API docs)


We add x to the list of files

vllm.title: [Model][Gemma3] Simplify image input validation
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Image input validation in Gemma 3 takes a surprisingly long time:

After flatten_bn(pixel_values, concat=True) even in V0 pixel_values will be tensors so there's no need to handle lists here. So there's no need to iterate over the tensor just to check the shapes, this PR fixes this.

vllm.title: [Model][Gemma3] Cast image pixel values already on CPU
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Gemma3 by default uses the bfloat16 dtype, however the hugging face processor outputs the pixel values of the 896x896 images in float32 which means these values need to be casted to the gemma3 data type. This currently happens on GPU.
This PR moves the casting to CPU during the input processing whic

vllm.title: [FEAT] [ROCm] Upgrade AITER Fused MoE kernels.
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR upgrades the AITER fused MoE kernels which introduces a new external API, fused_moe, from the aiter package. The fused_moe API automatically selects and invokes the appropriate type of MoE kernel based on the specified quantization method.
lm_eval Results
Qwen/Qwen3-30B-A3B-FP8
VLLM_USE_V1=1
